---
name: Test
about: Add, update, or improve tests
title: "[test] "
labels: test
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what needs to be tested and why.

## Scope

What is being tested — unit, integration, or end-to-end. Which module, function, or workflow the tests cover.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tests are written and passing
- [ ] Coverage meets the target threshold for the affected module
- [ ] No existing tests are broken
